description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a rectangular fenced plot featuring a flat roof and large floor-to-ceiling windows along multiple facades. The structure is L-shaped, with a spacious open lawn surrounding the building and a paved patio area with outdoor seating and a pergola. The exterior walls are finished in a light, smooth material, likely concrete or stucco, and the roof sections are slightly raised with clean, geometric lines. There are several landscaped elements, including a row of small trees or shrubs near the entrance and a flowering bush adjacent to the house. The main entrance appears to be sheltered by a pergola, and the rear includes a private outdoor dining area. The overall design emphasizes minimalism, openness, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, L-shaped bungalow with flat roofs, expansive glass windows, and landscaped outdoor spaces within a fenced yard. Features include a pergola entrance, patio seating, and minimalist architectural lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass facade, large windows, and a patio area with outdoor seating under a pergola.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pergola-covered entrance, a row of small trees, and the L-shaped layout of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private patio, additional greenery, and the building's geometric rooflines.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible back doors, a flowering bush, and the open lawn extending around the structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
